name: BADGER METER INC
summary: Badger Meter, Inc. (the Company) is a leading innovator, manufacturer and marketer of products incorporating flow measurement, quality, control and other system solutions serving markets worldwide. The Company was incorporated in 1905. Throughout this 2025 Annual Report on Form 10-K, the words we, us and our refer to the Company.
